parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-20098 llite: ll_statfs_internal() to ignore reqs
commit.message:
LU-20098 llite: ll_statfs_internal() to ignore reqs

until client's mount is finished and everything is initialized.
also, deregister llite's procfs entries early to prevent access
to structures being released.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I77691c78c7e1c5e6d098d1804b505fbc33df5b54
